message:
🐛 Fix dashboard cards showing no data in cluster mode (#885)

When deployed in-cluster without kc-agent, the backend API returns valid
data via the ServiceAccount, but frontend gating conflated "agent
offline" with "no data source available".

Changes:
- CardDataContext: Allow live data when backend is connected even if
  agent is offline (isBackendConnected() check)
- CardWrapper: Don't force skeleton when backend provides data
- Layout: Hide offline banner when backend is connected
- useCachedData: Skip agent-only fetch paths when agent is unavailable,
  allowing fallthrough to REST API

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
